productName: Seattle Bubble Works Hash-Infused Joint - Blue Dream (S) - .75g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Blue Dream flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
